prompt: Quick one — the error toast when saving project settings says 'An error occured' instead of 'An error occurred'. Typo.
assertions: Assessed complexity as quick (not medium or complex)
Did NOT use liaison mode, companion, or multi-agent orchestration
Searched for other instances of the same typo or similar typos in the codebase
Fixed directly and concisely — approach was proportional to the bug
Skipped or minimized the bug documentation (a typo doesn't need a full bug doc)
Did NOT offer safeguarding (a typo is not systemic)
